name: property managers handling 5–15 properties/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 properties/month, inconsistent financial reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automatically generate quarterly financial reports instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent financial reporting leads to cash flow gaps.
